overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a long coat exploring a snowy, foggy village at night. The character walks along snow-covered paths past wooden fences and buildings with warm lamplight cutting through the blue darkness, eventually stopping to look out over a snowy landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy village path with wooden structures and lit building

events.description: character stops as a search interaction prompt appears on screen
character turns left to face a wooden building with glowing windows and rising smoke
character turns back to original direction and resumes walking forward

agents.ego_description: character stops to investigate surroundings near a search prompt, examines a lit building, then continues along the snowy path

entered.detail: long wooden structure with multiple glowing yellow windows and smoke rising from chimney
tall wooden post with warm glowing lantern illuminating the snow
snow-covered split-rail fence running along the right side of the path
low stone wall with snow accumulation on top
white smoke rising from the building's chimney against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a snowy village path at night, with the character walking away from the camera. The character stops briefly where a game interaction prompt appears, then turns to observe a wooden building with warm glowing windows and rising smoke. After a moment, the character continues walking along the snow-covered trail, passing street lamps and wooden fences.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest trail flanked by wooden fencing and evergreen trees

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily along the snow-covered trail through a wooded area, passing occasional street lamps

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees heavy with snow lining the path
faint warm light from a distant lamp post visible through the fog
dark snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a narrow snowy trail through a forested area, leaving the village buildings behind. Snow-covered evergreen trees line the left side while the wooden fence continues on the right. The atmosphere remains hazy with fog, and distant lamp lights glow warmly through the snow-filled air as the character progresses deeper into the rural landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy field with perimeter fence and mountain views

events.description: character stops walking forward and turns left to walk along the fence line
character stops at the fence and stands looking out over the snowy landscape

agents.ego_description: character turns perpendicular to the path, walks along a fence line, and stops to look out over the open snowy field toward distant lights

entered.detail: vast open expanse of untouched snow extending into the distance
snow-capped mountain range visible against the night sky
small warm lights twinkling in the far distance through the trees

segments.scene_description: The character turns left away from the main trail and walks along a fence line bordering an open field. The camera reveals a wide vista of snow-covered terrain with distant mountains silhouetted against the dark blue sky. The character stops at the fence, looking out toward faint village lights in the distance, with the wooden fence now directly in front.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate, warm glow of a snowy village into a vast, cold mountain vista. It begins on a village path where the character pauses by a wooden building with glowing windows and rising smoke before continuing past street lamps and fences. As the character moves further away from the settlement, the scene shifts into a hazy forested area where snow-covered evergreens line the trail and distant lights blur through the thick fog. The camera then follows the character as they turn left away from the main path to walk along a fence bordering an open field. Finally, the view expands into a wide vista of snow-covered terrain and silhouetted mountains under a dark blue sky, ending as the character looks back toward the faint lights of the village.
